title: Checkout
deliveryAreaHelper:
Bu'eine Nujeidat (local): free delivery over ₪{{localMin}}, otherwise ₪{{localFee}}.
Other supported areas: free delivery over ₪{{outsideMin}}, otherwise ₪{{outsideFee}}.
feeEstimateNote: Estimate — the final fee is calculated by the store.
phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Israeli phone number
preorderNotice: Your cart contains preorder items (e.g. fruit platters).
preorderHelper: Fruit platters require at least {{hours}} hours advance notice. Pick a delivery/preparation date.
preorderDateTooSoon: Selected date must be at least {{hours}} hours from now.
bankTransferProofHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP — up to 3MB. Helps the store verify your payment.
bankTransferProofInvalidType: Please choose an image (JPEG, PNG, or WebP).

businessHoursNotice.title: Business hours notice
businessHoursNotice.message: Your order will be received, but delivery will be handled only during the store's business hours. Thank you for understanding 🌿
businessHoursNotice.declineButton: No, don't continue with the order
